mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the effective federal funds rate over the trailing 3 months lowers the discount rate applied to equity cash flows and signals accommodative policy, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days regardless of other conditions.
failure_condition: Rank IC between 3-month FEDFUNDS change and 20d forward SPX return stays below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year walk-forward window, or returns following declines are not statistically higher than returns following increases (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises more than 0.2 percentage points over a 3-month window during a late-cycle expansion, it signals an inflection toward labor market deterioration that historically precedes equity drawdowns, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: In more than 55% of historical trigger instances during expansions, 20d forward SPX returns are positive, or the signal shows no statistically significant negative mean return (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Robust retail sales growth (RSAFS) combined with a low or falling federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) jointly signal strong consumer demand financed by cheap credit, a combination that supports sustained equity appreciation over a full quarter, more than either series predicts alone.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month annualized growth > 4% AND FEDFUNDS below its trailing 12-month average
regime_hint: monetary easing with resilient consumer demand
failure_condition: The joint-trigger sample shows no improvement in Rank IC over either single-series model, or 60d forward returns in joint-trigger periods are statistically indistinguishable from unconditional 60d returns (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent month-over-month increases in industrial production (INDPRO) reflect expanding real output and corporate earnings capacity, driving modest positive S&P 500 returns over the following trading week as investors incrementally price in stronger fundamentals.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns following positive INDPRO prints are not significantly different from returns following negative prints (p > 0.05) across a 3-year rolling sample.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month payroll gain in PAYEMS exceeding 200,000 signals accelerating labor demand and consumer income growth, which supports positive equity returns over the subsequent month as earnings expectations are revised upward.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns following triggered strong payroll prints fail to exceed the unconditional mean 20d return by a statistically significant margin (p > 0.05) over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: During a housing-led recovery regime, sustained increases in housing starts (HOUST) over 3 months signal broadening demand and construction-linked employment and spending, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the following quarter; the same signal is unreliable outside a housing recovery regime.
candidate_trigger: HOUST 3-month moving average rises for 3 consecutive months
failure_condition: Sign of the HOUST-return relationship flips or Rank IC falls below 0.02 when tested outside identified housing-recovery windows, or fails to hold with p < 0.05 within them.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation rises above 3%, markets price in expectations of monetary tightening that compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month until inflation moderates.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns during above-3% inflation periods are not significantly lower than baseline returns (p > 0.05), or more than 55% of trigger instances produce positive returns.

mechanism_narrative: The joint occurrence of falling UNRATE alongside a rising FEDFUNDS rate signals late-cycle overheating where policy tightening is reacting to labor market tightness, creating near-term equity volatility and negative returns over the next trading week as markets reassess terminal rate expectations.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls > 0.1pp over 3 months AND FEDFUNDS rises over same window
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with tight labor market
failure_condition: The joint-trigger sample fails to show negative mean 5d returns distinct from either single-series signal (interaction term not significant at p < 0.05), or Rank IC of the interaction model is below that of the single-series UNRATE model.
